paragraphs.text: GLOSSARY OF TERMS PART 3
ADONAI Factor
Definition: A divine test or trial administered by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID to refine
and prove the worthiness of believers.
2. Agreement (100%, 75%, 80%, Less Than 75%)
Definition: The level of unity among the faithful, which impacts the likelihood of resurrection; 100% agreement represents full unity, while less than 75% indicates division.
Believing GOD
Definition: A state of faith and trust in GOD's promises, especially in the context of resurrection and divine intervention.
Crowned Eagles Global
Definition: THE TRINITY'S LAST DAYS MINISTRY VEHICLE ON EARTH and THE LAST DAYS NOAH'S ARK prepared by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH

SHEKINAIH to save the remnant to escape the earth that will be destroyed by fire in the last days. A prophetic term describes a group or movement within the church prepared to operate in the resurrection power of THE TRINITY.
Divine Timing (Kairos Factor)
Definition: The perfect timing as ordained by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH for events to unfold, particularly in the context of resurrection.
Fullness of Time
Definition: The precise moment when all conditions are met according to God's plan, allowing for the manifestation of the resurrection.
Heavenly Script(s)
Definition: The divine blueprint or plan written in the heavens that dictates the timing and conditions for resurrection.
Hell Factor(s)
Definition: The various spiritual conditions and levels in the afterlife determine a soul's proximity to resurrection.
Last Days' Army
Definition: A prophetic term for the group of believers chosen to fulfill God's purposes in the final days, often associated with resurrection power.
Majority Factor
Definition: The collective agreement among the faithful, which influences the likelihood of resurrection based on the level of unity.
Perfection Standard
Definition: The divine criteria for purity, obedience, and alignment with God's will are required to access resurrection power.
Pros and Cons of Controversy
Definition: The benefits and drawbacks of engaging in controversy, particularly defending the truth and demonstrating resurrection power.
Resurrection Power
Definition: The divine ability to physically and spiritually restore life according to God's will and purpose.
Sovereignty Factor
Definition: The absolute authority of THE TRINITY, exercised through SHEKINAIH, in determining the outcome of resurrection and other divine interventions.
SHEKINAIH

Definition: A representation of the divine presence and authority, acting on behalf of THE TRINITY in the resurrection process. The sacred vessel through whom THE TRINITY speaks and executes divine will on Earth.
Spiritual Offences of the ADONAI
Definition: The trials and tests designed to reveal the true sons of ELOHIM, distinguishing those who are truly aligned with GOD's will.
The Circumstances Present at that Time
Definition: The specific conditions and environment at the time of resurrection must align with the divine plan for it to occur.
The Deceased
Definition: Those who have passed away but whose spiritual condition may still allow for resurrection based on divine criteria.
The Living Parties
Definition: The living believers who play a role in interceding and preparing for the resurrection of the deceased.
The Purpose of Resurrection
Definition: The divine intention behind the resurrection is to fulfill GOD's glory, authority, and purposes on earth.
The Weighing Factor(s)
Definition: The process by which the voices and influences surrounding a resurrection are measured to ensure they align with the divine will.
The Will of THE TRINITY
Definition: The collective will of GOD, THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT, and THE SON JESUS CHRIST IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, which dictates the criteria and conditions for resurrection.
The Walk of a Bride & Anointed Ones
Definition: The spiritual journey of those chosen by GOD, characterized by purity, obedience, and alignment with divine purpose, particularly in resurrection.
Test Papers of ADONAI
Definition: Spiritual tests administered by GOD to assess the faith, obedience, and worthiness of believers for resurrection.
Which Level(s) They Are In
Definition:The specific spiritual level in the afterlife where a soul resides, impacting their eligibility for resurrection.
THE TRINITY

Definition: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH refers to the Christian doctrine that God exists as three persons in one essence: THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT AND THE SON (JESUS CHRIST), These three persons are distinct yet coexist in unity

Clarification for Readers: "THE TRINITY is the Christian belief in one God who exists in three persons: GOD THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT. AND JESUS CHRIST THE SON, and THEY are three distinct persons but are one in essence and work together in perfect unity."
The Power of the Age to Come

Definition: This phrase typically refers to the miraculous powers and spiritual authority believed to be granted to disciples in the eschatological (end times) period. It can also refer to the foretaste of the powers of the Kingdom of God that true disciples of THE BIBLE GOD, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID
experience in the present age, pointing to the fullness of those powers that will be revealed in the future.

Clarification for Readers: "The Power of the Age to Come refers to the miraculous and spiritual authority of real disciples, called The sons/daughters of GOD, of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID will experience during the end times. It's a glimpse of the divine power that will be fully realized when God's Kingdom is established on earth."
The Resurrection of the Dead

Definition: In Christian theology, the resurrection of the dead refers to the belief that all people will be raised from the dead at the end of time. The righteous will be granted eternal life, while the unrighteous will face judgment.

Clarification for Readers: "The Resurrection of the Dead is the Christian belief that all people will be brought back to life at the end of time. The righteous will be rewarded with eternal life, and the unrighteous will face judgment." However, according to THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, "100% ALLEGIANCE TO THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID" EQUAL TO RIGHTEOUS, IN OUR EYES," SAYS THE TRINITY.
Noah's Ark

Definition: Noah's Ark refers to the biblical story in the Book of Genesis in which Noah builds an ark (a large boat) to save his family and two of every kind of animal from a global flood sent by God as a judgment on humanity's wickedness.

Clarification for Readers: "Noah's Ark is the story from the Bible where Noah, a righteous man, built a large boat to save his family and animals from a flood that God sent to cleanse the earth of wickedness."
Cherubim of Glory

Definition: Cherubim are angelic beings mentioned in the Bible, often associated with guarding sacred spaces and representing God's presence. The phrase "Cherubim of Glory" can refer to their role in guarding the Ark of the Covenant, which held the Ten Commandments and represented God's covenant with Israel and the spiritual Israel or spiritual Jews in modern-day terms.
Clarification for Readers: "Cherubim of Glory are powerful angels who, according to the Bible, guard sacred places like the Ark of the Covenant, which was a symbol of God's promise to His people."
The Ark of the Covenant

Definition: The Ark of the Covenant is a gold-covered wooden chest described in the Book of Exodus as containing the two stone tablets of the Ten Commandments. It represented God's presence with the Israelites and was kept in the Holy of Holies in the Tabernacle and later in the Temple in Jerusalem.

Clarification for Readers: "The Ark of the Covenant was a sacred chest that held the Ten Commandments. It symbolized God's presence with His people, the Israelites or the spiritual Jews worldwide, in the last days."
Metamorphosis into an Archangel

Definition: Metamorphosis is a process of transformation. In this context, it refers to a profound spiritual change in which a believer becomes a powerful angelic being (an Archangel) with immense authority in the spiritual realm.

Their authority is 1 million times greater than an ordinary son or daughter of God, who had just passed THE SEVEN OFFENCES OF THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID. TO BE AN ARCHANGEL, ON TOP OF PASSING THE SEVEN OFFENCES OF THE ADONAI, ONE MUST OBEY WITHOUT QUESTIONS ASKED AND 100% YIELDEDNESS WITH JOY AND PEACE AS WELL!. THE ARCHANGELS ARE THE 144,000 VIRGIN BRIDES WITHOUT SPOT AND BLEMISHES IN OUR SIGHT, AFFRIM THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH.

Clarification for Readers: "Metamorphosis into an Archangel refers to a transformative process where a disciple of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID is spiritually elevated to become a powerful angel, endowed with significant authority by God, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN./SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID."
Mount Zion of Holiness

Definition: Mount Zion is a biblical term for a hill in Jerusalem, often symbolizing the dwelling place of God and a place of holiness. It's associated with God's rule, His Kingdom's coming, and His people's gathering.
Clarification for Readers: "Mount Zion of Holiness symbolizes God's sacred dwelling place and the centre of His Kingdom. It's where God's people are gathered and His holiness fully manifests."
Sowing and Reaping

Definition: This is a biblical principle found in Galatians 6:7, which states, "Do not be deceived: God cannot be mocked. A man reaps what he sows." It refers to the idea that one's actions, whether good or bad, will result in corresponding outcomes.
Clarification for Readers: "Sowing and Reaping is a biblical concept that means whatever actions you take, whether good or bad, will bring about corresponding results in your life."
Kairos Factor
Definition: Kairos is a Greek word meaning the right, critical, or opportune moment. In theology, it often refers to God's perfect timing rather than chronological time (chronos).
Clarification for Readers: "The Kairos Factor refers to God's perfect timing for events to happen. It's about divine moments that align with God's plan rather than just the passage of time."
The Power of the Age to Come

This term refers to a divine spiritual principle in which authority and supernatural power are granted by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH to those aligned with heavenly principles. This power is given specifically to SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID, as well as to the disciples of JESUS and followers of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS

IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID. It represents the supernatural power that will fully manifest in the future "age to come" but is partly available to those who are faithful and obedient in this present time.

This power enables individuals to experience miraculous interventions such as resurrection and healing and to access heavenly realities on Earth, as depicted in the image of the Blessed Life in Appendix 7 (Extract from BEHOLD MY MESSENGER 2: BEHOLD MY ANOINTED ONES, pages 303 to 314).
Section D: Their Reward, Chapter 1: The Blessed Life further illustrates this power and the divine rewards that follow those aligned with THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH'S will.

The Power of the Age to Come is a foretaste of the fullness of God's kingdom, reserved for those who walk in faith, obedience, and perfect alignment with divine will, as demonstrated by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID.
The Power of the Age to Come: A prophetic term referring to the authority given to those aligned with Heaven's purposes in the last days, specifically the power to resurrect the dead.
Cherubim of Glory

The Cherubim of Glory is among the highest order of angels who serve closest to THE TRINITY. They symbolize God's glory, majesty, and divine presence. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH is the Covering Cherub among the cherubim, and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID is the Subservient Cherub. Together, they serve as the cherubim that cover the Ark of the Covenant and the Tree of Life in the Garden of Eden, representing divine protection, authority, and the direct manifestation of God's power. The cherubim are often depicted as guardians of sacred places, such as the Garden of Eden and the Ark of the Covenant, which contains God's divine laws. Their presence signifies the highest level of divine protection and holiness. They are associated with guarding the divine order and executing the will of THE TRINITY. Disobedience to these appointed Cherubim, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH
AARON K DAVID can lead to severe consequences, just as it did in the Old Testament, where failure to honour or obey the divine laws resulted in immediate judgment.
Ark of the Covenant

The Ark of the Covenant is a sacred chest described in the Bible that held the tablets of the Ten Commandments, a symbol of God's promise and covenant with His people. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID are divinely appointed as the Cherubim that cover the Ark of the Covenant. THEY protect God's presence and divine law. Throughout biblical history, the Ark represented the power and presence of God among His chosen people, Israel and in the spiritual Jew worldwide as well.

The Ark was carried during significant moments, such as the crossing of the Jordan River and the fall of Jericho, signifying God's guidance and victory. It was placed in the Holy of Holies, the innermost sanctuary of the Tabernacle and later the Temple, where God's presence would dwell. Disobeying the instructions associated with the Ark - whether through irreverence or rebellion - resulted in severe consequences, such as the deaths of those who touched it unlawfully (as in the case of Uzzah in 2 Samuel 6:7). These examples serve as a warning that disobedience to divine order, including the commands of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID, can lead to judgment and loss.

The Ark of the Covenant signifies God's unbreakable promise, guidance, and power to lead, protect, and bless those who follow His will. However, disobedience to the Ark's instructions, or the divine Cherubim who protect it, brings severe consequences, as evidenced in the days of the Old Testament.
144,000 Warrior Bride
A prophetic group of chosen believers who will lead the armies of Heaven in the final days.
CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL
The divinely appointed organization through which the power of resurrection and end-time revelations are administered.
"In the end, the Final Declaration is made, and the fates of all are sealed according to the will of THE TRINITY, as written in The Heavenly Scripts."
